## --- Core Framework & Servers ---##
fastapi
uvicorn
python-multipart
pywebview

## --- Audio Processing ---##
kokoro-onnx
huggingface_hub
numpy
soundfile
pydub


## --- Text Processing & Utilities ---##
requests
pydantic
beautifulsoup4
lxml
num2words
eng_to_ipa

## --- Document Parsing ---##
ebooklib
PyMuPDF

## --- CJK Voice Support (Chinese & Japanese) ---##
misaki[zh]
fugashi
unidic-lite
jaconv
jamdict

##For audioop-lts it seem didn't requirement when run in 3.13##
##audioop-lts; python_version >= "3.13"##
##scipy xhtml2pdf lxml psutil pykakasi torch no need to use it 
##mojimoji no support for 3.13 use jaconv instead. ####
